compiled_state.title: Implement hook_record_agent_attribution in post-functions.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Add hook_record_agent_attribution(input_json) to plugins/dso/hooks/lib/post-functions.sh. Guard is early-return INSIDE function body using read_config_value: [[ "$(read_config_value attribution.enabled)" == "true" ]] || return 0. When enabled, extracts subagent_type and model from input JSON and appends {"type":"agent","subagent_type":"<value>","model":"<value>"} to $ARTIFACTS_DIR/attribution-contributors.jsonl. Creates ARTIFACTS_DIR if absent. RED tests from T1a must exist and fail before starting. AC: (1) attribution.enabled=true + mock agent JSON -> JSONL line appended; verify by sourcing post-functions.sh with mock config and calling function; (2) attribution.enabled=false -> return 0, no file write; (3) all T1a tests pass (GREEN); (4) validate.sh --ci passes. Note: use config-file mock (write temp dso-config.conf with attribution.enabled=true, point config resolution to it) not bare ATTRIBUTION_ENABLED env var.
